resources.string: Total Capacity : %1$s MB\nUsed Space : %2$s MB\nFree Space : %3$s MB
Storage Error: Failed to calculate space.
Match Status Bar to Theme Font
Low-res dithered cover tinted to theme font color
Cover Flow flip and animated handoff to Now Playing
Artwork will be shown in a 3D perspective
Artwork will be shown in a flat 2D style
Send crash and feature logs for Solar support (on by default). Wi‑Fi may briefly wake if it was asleep.
Reach is offline — try again later
Report bugs or request features. Open this address in a browser on your computer:
Message Solar Development on this player. Your note is sent privately and can include diagnostics from this device.
Connect to Wi‑Fi and sign in to Reach to message Solar Development. Your message is sent to the developers and opens a private diagnostic report with logs from this device.
Message queued — diagnostics are being uploaded for the developers.
Solar is finishing setup on this player.
Thank you for supporting Solar. Open this page in a browser to donate:
Mark a track first (Center), then Play
Stem Player needs a local track file
When on, library search also shows online matches from Reach (needs Reach and internet).
List each credited artist separately when tags use feat., &, or similar.
Merge albums that differ only by capitalization.
For artists who only appear as guests, choose albums or songs first.
Limit the Artists list — hide one-track guests or show album owners only.
Order the Artists list A–Z, by track count, or by recently added.
Default sort for song lists in Artists, Albums, Genres, and playlists.
Order shared by Library Albums and Flow Albums.
Under albums, show the album owner when it differs from the track artist.
On guest tracks, show which artist owns the album below the song title.
Solar Reach is a Soulseek client — search peers and download tracks to Music.
Solar Reach · Soulseek network · Wi-Fi required
Ranked by free slot & upload speed. [***] = most likely to download.
Leave Reach and cancel this download?
Too many peer connections — try again in a moment.
Download paused — offline playback limited to buffered audio.
Ten-band equalizer. Import Rockbox or AutoEQ presets from Solar/EQ, Music/EQ, or .rockbox/eqs on your card. Soft EQ uses the built-in decoder when needed.
Could not set time. Check root and try again.

When on, headphone volume is capped at 80% of the device maximum and Solar shows a hearing safety warning at that level. When off (default), Solar bypasses Android headphone volume limits and allows the full range.
Listening at high volume may damage your hearing.
Keep scrolling right for more volume
Hearing Safety unlocked for this session

Left gutter on home and settings rows (on by default). Off = flush to the screen edge (iPod classic). Your choice is saved for this theme only — switching themes returns to that look’s default unless you change it there too.
This theme uses a menu mask and has not opted into flush — padding stays on so the mask lines up. Switch theme or add settingsMenu_Item_Padding:false / disableMenu_Item_Padding to flush.
At list ends, wheel wraps to the other end. Off by default.
Turns off Wi‑Fi 15 minutes after the screen sleeps on battery. Wi‑Fi turns back on when you wake the device or plug in.
Deletes the .rockbox folder from Internal Storage (/storage/sdcard0). Rockbox settings, themes, and playlists stored there will be removed.
Clears all Solar app preferences (settings, library rules, Reach/Deezer options, and similar). Does not delete music files unless you also choose MicroSD contents.
Deletes downloaded and custom theme folders on Internal Storage (Themes/ and JJ_Themes/) and Solar\u2019s internal theme cache.
Removes every file and folder on MicroSD. Files are overwritten once before deletion so standard recovery tools may still find them \u2014 this is not a secure wipe.
Clears album-art caches, Flow thumbnails, stream/download temp files, and other Solar cache data.
Selects all reset options below. Review each item before continuing.
Runs the selected reset steps. You will be asked to confirm before anything is deleted.

This will permanently delete the items you selected:

%1$s

Continue?
Select at least one item to reset.
Turn off USB storage before resetting MicroSD contents.
Reset failed. Some items may be unchanged.
Solar hit a crash loop. Open another app, clear the crash streak, or retry Solar.
Solar Versions app is not installed.
Some features may be limited on this player
Off (default): hold the center button opens the quick menu, like Back — use the sleep button for screen off. On: holding OK puts the screen to sleep (previous behaviour).
Choose which three buttons scroll menus and confirm. The other three skip tracks and play/pause. On Now Playing, the nav middle key goes back and the nav edges control volume.
Portrait (default): 240×320 tall layout, full-width menus, no theme masks. Landscape: normal themes scaled to 240p height.
Choose where new downloads, podcasts, and recordings go. Your library still shows media from every mounted volume. Defaults to MicroSD when a card is healthy, or Internal when the card is missing.
Legacy toggle. Prefer Primary storage: pick MicroSD or Internal as the only destination for new downloads. Library scans always include every mounted volume.
Enable USB storage automatically when a PC connects.
Let the system USB screen handle the cable (lighter). Turn off to use Solar\u2019s USB prompt.
No installed themes match this filter.
No downloadable themes match this filter.
Connect to the internet to browse online themes.
Settings can\'t be hidden. Use Arrange to change its position.
This will interrupt downloads, streaming, or music sharing in progress.
Enter this PIN on the other device:\n\n%1$s
Make sure this PIN matches the other device:\n\n%1$s
Allow %1$s to connect to this player?
[prev] delete · [play] OK · [next] space\n[play] hold Aa/# · [wheel] pick · [ok] type\n[back] cancel
Vol: space / delete · Back: Enter · Hold Back: Aa / #\nFace mid: type · Wheel/face: pick · Edge flick: cancel
Solar typing helper — pastes text when the wheel keyboard cannot reach a field directly.
No favorites yet. In Library or Now Playing, hold Back for the menu, then choose Add to favorites.
Delete this song from your player? This cannot be undone.
Delete all songs in this album from your player? This cannot be undone.
Could not play this Plex track
Could not play this Jellyfin track

Install %1$s on this player?

Root: silent install to internal storage.
No root: Android install screen opens.
Complete install on the next screen.
Use Settings → About to update Solar.
Turn the wheel to adjust the brightness.
Enter the above address in your PC browser.\nPress [Back] to return.
The Web Server is still active. Do you want to shut it down completely and exit?
Internet connection required to browse online themes.
Failed to load themes.\nCheck Wi-Fi and try again.
Sets the clock from the internet when Wi‑Fi is already online. Does not wake Wi‑Fi in the background. Time zone is your choice below.
Manual date and time only — fully offline.
Uses your zone’s spring-forward / fall-back rules (works offline).
Keeps standard time year-round for the selected zone (works offline).
Downloads the Rockbox-Y1 APK and native libraries (root). On Y2, SolarRockboxCompat keeps Rockbox working with Solar OS.
JJ Launcher updated (system app — settings kept).
JJ Launcher update failed — check Wi‑Fi and root.
Rockbox-Y1 install failed — check Wi‑Fi and root.
Off by default. Unlocks Install Rockbox-Y1 in Change version and Use Rockbox under Home launcher. Y2 runs Rockbox-Y1 with the Rockbox compatibility Xposed module.
Off by default. Enables Music → Plex, Settings → Library → Plex, and search. Wi‑Fi transfer /plex also turns this on when you save.
Off by default. Enables Music → Jellyfin, Settings → Library → Jellyfin, and search. Wi‑Fi transfer /jellyfin also turns this on when you save.
Off by default. On: normal Y1/Y2 sideways menus and themes scaled to 240p (320×240). Off: tall portrait chrome. Undo: turn Off here, or Device → Portrait.

Off by default. Cycles Off → Wheel right → Left-handed. Tall menus like A5/nano, narrow context menu, global wallpaper. Track prev/next = Play/Pause / Back; scroll wheel still scrolls menus (skips tracks on Now Playing). Undo: cycle back to Off.
Enter a username and password to log in. Soulseek creates the account on first successful login. Inactive 30+ days may be recycled.
Login failed: %1$s — check Settings → Account or Regenerate.
Invalid account — reset to new auto account.
Reach uses Soulseek TCP port %1$d. If downloads fail, forward this port on your router.
Download-only — some users only allow downloaders who share files.
Listen port: connect to Reach first
Forward this TCP port on your router for downloads.
Sharing: off (NAT-PMP unavailable on this network)

Sharing and profile exchange run whenever you are on Wi‑Fi with a successful NAT-PMP port forward — no charger needed. Turn Wi‑Fi off to stop Reach from using the network; without Wi‑Fi or NAT-PMP the Soulseek client stays disconnected to save power.
Soulseek search, messaging, chat rooms, and peer sharing.
Soulseek is off. Enable it in Settings → Reach.
Reach is turned off. Enable it here to search and share on Soulseek.
Reach cannot accept peer connections on this network. Downloads, search, and sharing need a mapped listen port (NAT-PMP or manual router forward).
You appear to be on a mobile data connection. Reach rarely works on 4G/5G or Personal Hotspot because carriers use CG-NAT and block inbound ports.
Your router did not grant a NAT-PMP port map. Try home Wi‑Fi with UPnP/NAT-PMP enabled, or forward the TCP listen port shown in Connection.
No local gateway was found — common on captive portal Wi‑Fi, guest networks, or isolated work/school VLANs.
The port map dropped and did not come back. Peer transfers are paused until mapping succeeds again.
The Soulseek server connection may still work — messages and account settings can remain available.
Peer features are off on this network. Connect to home Wi‑Fi with port forwarding, or use Messages if enabled.
Reach peer connection lost — transfers may fail on this network.
Thank you for %1$s from %2$s — Check out Reach for Innioasis %3$s
Lets you send and receive private messages with other Soulseek users. Your Reach friend code is shown when messaging is enabled.
No other Reach users online in the last 24 hours.
Reach directory is not configured on this build.
Search for a chat room to join.
*%1$s* is writing from an Innioasis %2$s using the Reach client. They may write replies slowly as they are on an MP3 player. (No really - github.com/thesolarproject/solar)
This user has no browsable files right now.
No conversations yet. Press OK on New message to start one.
%1$d conversation(s). Select a contact to open the thread.
This user may require you to share files. Enable sharing in Reach settings and wait for your library to index.
%1$s is online but lists no shared files — they may require reciprocity.
Enable sharing in Reach settings to download from users who require reciprocity.
No messages yet. Select a message and press OK to reply.
Reach is a Soulseek client built for Innioasis %1$s music players — browse, search, download, message, and share from your player over Wi‑Fi.\nhttps://github.com/thesolarproject/solar
I\'m happy to share my library. Folder browse from my player can be unreliable while I\'m away; downloads work best when my player is online at home.
My library is not shared from this player.
Feel free to send a message!
Private messaging is off on this player.
Generate a new friend code? Your current Soulseek account will be replaced.
Settings: Reach / Soulseek / Find Reach users
Deezer search and downloads in Get Music.
Deezer is off. Enable it in Settings → Reach.
Set up Deezer on PC — start Wi‑Fi Transfer, open /deezer
Device is in USB Storage mode
Could not turn on USB storage. Eject any open files on the player and try again.
Please eject your %1$s from the computer and remove the USB cable when you\'re finished
Please disconnect the USB to view your playback queue.
Some content won\u2019t be shown until you unplug USB.
On your PC browser, open the address above.\nLog in to Deezer and paste your arl cookie.\nPress [Back] when finished.
You can return here any time from Settings → Deezer → Set up on PC.
A built-in test ARL is active for testers. Paste your own arl below to replace it.
When on, Reach search results appear in Get Music and Get more.
When on, Deezer search results appear in Get Music and Get more.
No music services available for Get Music. Check Settings.
No matches on Deezer or Reach
Sign in to Deezer in Settings
Keep holding Back to restart Solar…
No data yet (%1$s). Peer may be offline, queued, or blocked — try another result.
Reach server unreachable — will retry in the background.
Peer offline or unreachable — try another result.
Could not connect to peer — check Wi‑Fi and port forwarding.
Peer did not respond — they may be offline or queueing uploads.
File transfer timed out — forward your Reach listen port on the router.
Searching finished: %1$s (%2$d results) — download in progress
No other peers with this exact filename
Reach maps your listen port via NAT-PMP (retries alternate gateways, renews every 30 min). If mapping fails, forward the TCP port above on your router.
Search the Soulseek network and download tracks to Music.
Solar Reach — Soulseek client. Account and sharing notes.
Creates a new dictionary-word friend code and fixed auto password.
Internet connection required for podcast streaming.
Internet connection required for podcast search.
Internet connection required to load episodes.
Connect Wi-Fi to search and stream. Saved episodes work offline.
Saved to Podcasts folder on SD card.
Permanently deletes this playlist. Music files on your device are not removed.
Permanently deletes this playlist from your Deezer account, including all tracks in it. Saved local copies are not removed.
Hold Back or Power for Options

Hold OK on a track to pick it up.

Scroll the wheel to move it — the tracks above and below show where it will land.

Press OK again to place it.

Press Back to cancel and restore the original order.
Press OK again to place the track.
Hold OK — pick up the track, then scroll to move it in the queue.
Saved password required — connect this network in Solar Settings.
Open Solar for the play queue.
Restarting to complete update, ETA 3 Minutes
Solar %1$s needs a full ROM flash from a PC before you can install newer APK updates over the air. Use SP Flash Tool, MTK Client, or your PC flash workflow to install the ROM for this release first.
Solar is finishing setup on this player…
Some system features may be limited on this player. Music and settings will still work.
This player is running with limited system features. Music and settings will still work.
Hook modules installed and enabled. Restart once to activate them.
No saved episodes on SD card.
%1$d podcast(s) hidden — feed or audio not reachable on this device.
%1$d episode(s) hidden — audio not reachable on this device.
Do you want to shut down the device?
⚠️System security prevents powering off directly from the app.
Switch to Rockbox now? Solar will close until you switch back from Rockbox.
Rockbox is not installed on this device.
Rockbox is on this device but not registered. Reflash the latest Solar Y2 ROM (includes a patched Rockbox APK).
Pick another home screen or continue with Solar. %1$s stopped several times in the last two minutes.
Stock (Innioasis) launcher is not installed on this device.
Failed: check that Stock (Innioasis) is installed and root is available.

Your choice is remembered. Switch anytime from here or the global quick menu. Hold Back or Power for 10 seconds in any app to return to Solar. Rockbox install and switch are under Debug → Rockbox experiment. JJ Launcher needs internet to install the first time.
Please wait…\nInstalling or switching to JJ Launcher.
Failed: install JJ Launcher when online, or check root access.
JJ Launcher needs an internet connection to install.
No reboot. Switch back from Rockbox System menu or hold Back+Play.
Use themes from /JJ_Themes/ instead of Y1 Themes/
Could not save stream track to playlist: %1$s
Off by default. Unlocks FM Radio and Internet radio while we finish the FM implementation.
On by default. Off hides Videos → YouTube and Music → YouTube. Uses Solar’s built-in Invidious/Piped clients (needs Wi‑Fi).
Unavailable — Y2 uses MTP only. USB disk mode is not supported on this Android 4.4.2 build.
USB mass storage is not available on this device. Y2 uses MTP for PC file transfer.
Root is required to apply Xposed module changes.
Could not write Xposed module config.

Lists every Xposed hook module installed on this device. Open a module to enable it or change its options. Enable/disable changes need Apply and a reboot. Inline module options save immediately when root is available.
Disabling Rockbox IME removes native keyboard integration when Rockbox is running.\n\nRe-enable here and reboot to restore.
Disabling Rockbox compatibility removes coexistence fixes and audio routing hooks.\n\nRe-enable here and reboot to restore.

Disabling the context bridge removes:
• Global quick menu in third-party apps (BACK-long on Y1; power or BACK-long on Y2)
• Xposed hooks for stock app menus and dialogs
• Wheel handoff cooperation (sys.solar.handoff.active)
• Future Solar IME key-forward tiers

Re-enable here and reboot to restore.
Disabling theme font returns stock Holo fonts and unskinned stock apps (Settings, SystemUI) even when Solar themes are active.\n\nRe-enable here and reboot to restore sidecar skinning.

Disabling the NotPipe bridge removes:
• YouTube browse and search in Solar Videos
• Wheel controls in the NotPipe video player
• Stream resolve for experimental Solar IJK playback

Re-enable here and reboot to restore.
Module toggles are written to the Xposed Installer config and the device reboots. Required modules you turned off stay off until you enable them again here.

These hook modules are installed but not enabled yet:

%1$s

Open Xposed modules to turn them on, then apply and reboot.
Warning: required Solar modules are off. Global overlay, dialog replacement, and theme font may not work until you re-enable them below and reboot.
This Solar ROM module is required for normal operation. Turning it off may break overlay, handoff, dialogs, or fonts until you enable it here and reboot.\n\nYou can still disable it for debugging.
Third-party module — enable or disable freely. Apply and reboot to activate.
No Xposed modules found on this device. Install hook APKs or flash a Solar ROM with Xposed modules baked in.
This module has options you can change below or in its settings app.
Opens the hook module\'s own settings screen (standard Xposed module UI).
Could not save module option (root required).
This module has no settings screen.
Extra hook diagnostics in logcat (com.solar.launcher.xposed). Reboot may be needed for hooks to read the new value.
system_server MountService + UsbDeviceManager sync for disk mode. Requires Debug → USB mass storage (Y2 experiment) and reboot.
Delete all downloaded album covers to free up storage space?
Connect to Wi‑Fi or a local network first
Connect to Wi‑Fi or a local network first
This device does not support EQ presets.
FM radio is not available on this device.
Could not open FM Recordings folder.
Tap to cycle Wired / Bluetooth / Speaker
Earphones work best as the antenna. FM still opens without them — try Speaker in Audio if silent, or power off and on.
No audio path — try Speaker under Audio, or plug in earphones for better reception
Optional: earphones improve reception. Use Audio → Speaker if you want the built-in speaker.
Solar could not start FM (%1$s). Try again after unplugging earphones, or open stock FM Radio.
Turn off the FM radio and return to Solar? Wi‑Fi will be restored if it was on.
Use country and tag browse for now.
No suggestions right now. Try Search.
Could not load YouTube. Check connection and try again.
YouTube needs an internet connection. Check Wi‑Fi and try again.
YouTube backends are slow to wake. Try again in a moment, or check Wi‑Fi.
YouTube backends are slow to wake. Try again in a moment, or check Wi‑Fi.
Stream took too long — check Wi‑Fi and try again.
No comments available for this video.
Letterbox keeps the whole wide picture with bars. Crop 4:3 zooms to fill our screen like a TV Zoom setting.
Automatically enable Wireless ADB on startup if rooted
Erase and format the MicroSD card. Rooted Y1 uses a single partition; other devices open system storage settings.
Erases all data on the MicroSD (%1$s). This cannot be undone.
Enables debugging instrumentation only when USB/PC is connected
